topic: multiplying fractions and mixed numbers, multi-step word problem
latex:
You bike $5\frac{1}{2}$ miles from your house to a state park. You travel $\frac{1}{2}$ of that distance in the woods. You bike along the bank of a stream for the last $\frac{1}{2}$ of the woods. On how many miles of your trip do you bike along the bank of the stream? Write your answer as a fraction or mixed number in simplest form.

\underline{\hspace{1cm}} mile(s)
